description.from: Given a database with tables, when I call execute() with where, pk, fields, or limit directives, it should return matching records with correct field projection and limits. Spec: features/query/execute_basic.feature
description.to: Given a database with tables, when I call execute() with where, pk, fields, or limit directives, it should return matching records with correct field projection and limits. Non-existent table raises an error (fail fast). Non-existent GSI name raises an error. Spec: features/query/execute_basic.feature
